title: Annos 20th Anniversary of Evangelion Comment
wikitext:
[]: Anno's 20th Anniversary of Evangelion Comment.             Quote Post by shinhito » Wed Oct 07, 2015 1:15 am I tried searching for this but found no correlating topic. Anno posted a nice little comment about Evangelion's 20th Anniversary and I can understand a little bit of it with my rudimentary Japanese and this time I cannot get a broken Google Translate approximation because it's all image-ified into a .png! Anyway, here is the comment (taken from http://evangelion.co.jp/comment.html). Thanks in advance for any translation assistance!
